# ngx-dadata — Angular Dadata Suggestions Component

> Angular 19+ autocomplete component for Dadata.ru API.

## Docs

- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@kolkov/ngx-dadata)
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/kolkov/ngx-dadata/blob/master/AGENTS.md): AI agent instructions
- [Dadata API](https://dadata.ru/api/): Dadata suggestions API documentation

## Features

- 24 suggestion types (address, FIO, party, bank, email, country, metro, etc.)
- findById, geolocate, iplocate endpoints
- WAI-ARIA combobox (WCAG AA accessible)
- CSS custom properties theming
- Web Components via Angular Elements
- provideNgxDadata() for DI configuration
- 182 tests, 93%+ coverage
